message:
fix(widgets): use saturating i32 casts in virtualized scroll rendering (bd-157gb)

Replace bare `as i32` casts from usize with `i32::try_from().unwrap_or(i32::MAX)`
in the VirtualizedList render loop to prevent silent truncation with large item
counts. Also use saturating_sub/saturating_mul/saturating_add for all viewport
arithmetic to prevent overflow in extreme cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
